topic: CRM data entry and quote generation
description: Automates CRM activity logging (CRM 活動記録) and quote creation (見積書作成). Navigates to the CRM system, locates the target record, adds activity entries, and updates deal stages or generates quotes.

steps_hint: Navigate to CRM system (e.g. Salesforce, HubSpot)
Find the target account or deal record
Add activity log or meeting notes
Update deal stage or generate a quote
hints._comment: Pattern B: authentication-then-automate. CRM login may require human auth; subsequent data entry is fully automated.
